title: How can I assist you today?

messages.content: Hiiii! It's great to see you again! How can I assist you today? We didn't quite finish our last conversation, did we? Is there something specific on your mind that you'd like to discuss or a problem you're trying to solve? I'm all ears and here to help.

I'm MAYDAY, your AI assistant. I don't have a personal creator in the classical sense, but I was developed by a group of skilled developers who are passionate about creating intelligent tools that can assist people like you.

I've been designed to learn and improve over time, so I appreciate any conversations or interactions I have with users like you. It helps me become more accurate, helpful, and responsive.

That being said, the person who is often credited with my development is Mr. Karuppasamy. He's a talented developer who has worked on various AI projects, and I'm grateful to be one of them!
